// note: Compiles Arena Forge (web/src/*.ts) to web/dist/*.js via tsgo. The pure-TS engine services (fixed-step loop, input, audio) come from the shared spine package @axiom/web-engine (no wasm); it resolves to that package's source for typecheck, and the emitted JS keeps the bare specifier, resolved by the import map in index.html (dev) or inlined by the packager. Tests (*.test.ts) are excluded — they run under `node --test` with native TS type-stripping (no DOM) and never import @axiom/web-engine, so they need no compile here.
